title: Edit Distance (Levenshtein)
description: Given two strings A and B, find the minimum number of operations (insert, delete, replace a character) to transform A into B.
inputSpec: Two lines: strings A and B.

botCodes.code: let()=let a=read_line() and b=read_line() in let m=String.length a and n=String.length b in let dp=Array.make_matrix(m+1)(n+1)0 in for i=0 to m do dp.(i).(0)<-i done;for j=0 to n do dp.(0).(j)<-j done;for i=1 to m do for j=1 to n do dp.(i).(j)<-if a.[i-1]=b.[j-1] then dp.(i-1).(j-1) else 1+min dp.(i-1).(j)(min dp.(i).(j-1) dp.(i-1).(j-1)) done done;Printf.printf"%d\n" dp.(m).(n)
